holdings.infoBox: ILIT is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are PLS Group stock at 9.25%, Liontown at 9.14%, Mineral Resources at 8.59%, Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile at 7.65%, and Albemarle at 7.09%.

overview.description: The iShares Lithium Miners and Producers ETF (ILIT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is passively managed, providing exposure to the lithium industry by investing in stocks of lithium miners and compound manufacturers from all around the world. ILIT was launched on Jun 21, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
